description: Cross-encoder retry with a stable backbone. Feeds (response, neutral) jointly as two segments so the model can attend across both texts. Switches from DeBERTa-v3-base (collapsed to all-positive in setup105) to roberta-base (stable in this repo). Adds positive_class_weight_scale=1.5 to compensate for 70/30 class imbalance. Uses linear scheduler and grad clipping instead of cosine warmup. max_length=512 packs both texts into one sequence (~256 tokens each after special tokens). Trainer type: cross_encoder.
